description_long: This object is a stylized, polygonal red mushroom cap with a domed, multi-faceted surface. The cap is decorated with irregularly spaced, large white spots that are slightly blurred at the edges, reminiscent of the classic Amanita muscaria mushroom. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. There is no visible stem or gills, and the underside is not shown, suggesting the cap is the primary feature. The object is compact and rounded, with a geometric, faceted structure rather than a perfectly smooth dome. Its coloration and patterning make it visually striking and easily recognizable as a whimsical or cartoonish mushroom.
description: A red, faceted mushroom cap with large, blurred white spots and no visible stem, resembling a stylized Amanita muscaria. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective.
description_view_0: The cap's red surface is prominent, with several large white spots visible on the upper and side facets.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the lower side, with white spots distributed unevenly and the faceted geometry more apparent.
description_view_2: The cap appears rounder from this view, with white spots clustered toward the top and sides.
description_view_3: A nearly frontal view, highlighting the central red area and a balanced distribution of white spots across the cap.
attribute_cap_pattern: spotted with large, blurred white spots
